DECLARATION OF FRANCIS J. KELLY IN REFUSING TO HAVE THE DEFENDANT APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION ON MAY 2, 1997 IN VIOLATION OF CUT OFF DATE CCP 2024 (C). FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, MARJORIE

3:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MIAO ZHU LIN. ATTORNEY STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD APPEARED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFFS. ATTORNEY FRANCIS J. KELLY, ESQ. APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT MARJORIE CAMPBELL WHO WAS ALSO PRESENT. VISITING JUDGE RICHARD W. KESSELL. REPORTER LORETTA NAJARA. D. CARTER, CLERK. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. TERMS REPORTED. SEE CLERK MINUTES.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 4411P1070000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO FRANCIS J. KELLY, WARRANT #00093324, DATED MAY-06-1997

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, MARJORIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 86 MAYNARD STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST AND ATTY FEES. WRIT MAY ISSUE NOW. POSTING AFTER 5/15/97. NO PHYSICAL EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 11:5 9 P.M. ON 5/31/97. NO FURTHER STAYS. EXCEPT FOR SPECIFIC RE- SERVATIONS, EACH SIDE MUTUALLY RELEASES THE OTHER. SEE JUDGM ENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL TERMS.
